Home / Lore / Organizations / Joint Task Force

organization

Joint Task Force

The first-responder organization commonly called the JTF, which attempts to contain the outbreak before SHD activation and later contributes veterans to survivor groups.

Also known as: JTF

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

First response and SHD support

The JTF represents the conventional first response to the outbreak. When containment fails, SHD Agents are activated to reinforce the effort rather than replace the JTF's existence in the setting. [1]

Legacy in Lower Manhattan

JTF experience persists through veterans who join the Peacekeepers after surviving the extended crisis. [2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft's glossary describes the JTF as the first responders who attempt to contain the outbreak before Division Agents are activated. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Division Agents are sent to help the JTF regain control of the city. [1]

  3. confirmed

    Former JTF members later form part of the Peacekeepers in Lower Manhattan. [2]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionallied with
  • Peacekeeperscontributes to

Sources

  1. [1] The Division - A Glossary of Terms Every Agent Should Know — Ubisoft News (2018-05-30). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Command structure, named officers and regional JTF operations require direct mission and collectible evidence.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
